property.$description: Property tokens — keyed by the full CSS property that reaches <color> (StylePropertyMapReadOnly.keys()), DERIVED from @webref/css. $value is the short SHA of a derived atom, chosen by the property's contrast role.

-webkit-text-fill-color.$description: CSS `-webkit-text-fill-color` — text, pairs with background-color at 7:1 AAA. Points to any color with content hash 2f3b1b5a7388 (currently oklch-0-0-0-1).
